info.name: BharatAI API
info.description: India's AI-powered academic opportunity intelligence platform

request.description: Create a new application for an opportunity. Students only. One application per opportunity.
List the current user's applications, optionally filtered by status.

Update the status of an application. Enforces a valid state machine: draft→submitted, submitted→accepted/rejected, draft/submitted→withdrawn. Admin can update any application; students can only update their own.
Returns a checklist of preparation steps based on the opportunity's eligibility text.
Returns form field suggestions from the user's profile. Requires consent_to_autofill=true on profile. Rate-limited to 20 requests/hour.
Creates a new student account with email and password. Returns JWT tokens.
Returns JWT access and refresh tokens on successful authentication.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token + refresh token pair (rotation).

item.name: Logout and revoke current access token

query.description: Maximum number of opportunities to return (1–100)

request.description:
Returns a ranked list of opportunities tailored to the current user's profile, skills, interests, and past engagement.

**Ranking factors:** interest embedding similarity, skill keyword match, application history, deadline urgency.

**Cold start:** If the user has no profile data, returns the most recent active opportunities unsorted.

**Caching:** Results are cached in Redis (TTL: 5 min) and the response includes `cached: true` when served from cache.

query.description: If true, return only unread notifications

request.description: Returns the current user's notifications, newest first. Use `unread_only=true` to show only unread items. Supports `limit`/`offset` pagination.
Returns the number of unread notifications for the notification bell badge.
Marks a single notification as read. Returns 404 if the notification does not belong to the current user.
Bulk-marks every unread notification for the current user as read in a single operation.

query.description: Opportunities with deadline before this date

request.description: Cursor-paginated, filterable list of opportunities. Supports domain, deadline, institution, and keyword filters.

item.name: Get full profile with embedding status

request.description: Returns the authenticated user's core account fields (id, name, email, role, college, degree, year). For extended profile data (bio, skills, interests, social links) use `GET /api/v1/profile`.
Lightweight profile patch — prefer `PUT /api/v1/profile` for full profile management. This endpoint is kept for backward compatibility.
Upload a PDF resume (max 5 MB). The file is validated for MIME type and size before storage. After upload, the AI autofill pipeline extracts skills, education, and experience automatically.
